title: meteorologist findings/v2
description: Structured daily-tmax analysis emitted by the meteorologist persona. The artifact is persisted append-only; each threshold fans out onto one binary belief (design §9). v2 adds optional free-text rationale for replayable reasoning audit (D3 thesis).

thresholds.description: Per candidate bracket threshold, the judged probability tmax is at or above it. Monotone non-increasing as `ge` rises.

ge.description: The threshold in degrees Fahrenheit, e.g. 65 for `tmax >= 65`.

p.description: P(tmax >= ge), anchored on 1 - Phi((ge - mu)/sigma), adjusted only for a named mechanism.

sigma_trend.description: Whether forecast spread is tightening, steady, or widening for this date.

regime.description: Short phrase naming the dominant synoptic driver.

key_risk.description: The single most important mechanism or timing risk that could make the day verify away from mu.

rationale.description: Optional free-text explanation of WHY the probabilities were set as they are — the verbatim meteorologist reasoning that produced this read. Persisted append-only as part of the findings blob; never executed. Present when the forecast departs from the envelope or the synoptic picture is unusual. Omit when the analysis is routine and key_risk + regime fully capture the reasoning.
